headline: Séverin Nioule set for Sporting Charleroi move
body: Sporting Charleroi is reportedly close to signing Séverin Nioule on a three-year contract for an estimated €300K plus performance bonuses.
text:
🚨 EXCL- Le Sporting Charleroi sur le point de sécuriser la venue de Séverin Nioule ! 

🦓✍️ Contrat de 3 ans. 

💰Transfert sec estimé à €300K auquel il faudra ajouter des bonus à la performance. #mercato #RCSC #JPL
draft_caption:
Unconfirmed report RUMOUR | Séverin Nioule set for Sporting Charleroi move

#FPLVortex #Transfers
